footer.tagline: Revolutionizing language learning and communication through AI-powered technology.

hero.title: Meet <brand>Arcatext</brand>.
hero.imageAlt: The Arcatext keyboard translating and correcting a message in a chat app.

features.eyebrow: One app, every part of the conversation
features.title: Everything you need to talk across languages
features.subtitle: Arcatext is an AI keyboard that lives inside the apps you already use and covers all aspects of sending and receiving messages during a conversation.

receive.title: Understand every reply, without leaving the keyboard
receive.description: Paste messages you receive and Arcatext translates it within the app, so you never need to leave the conversation.
bullets: Translate incoming messages right where you type
Compare the literal and natural meaning side by side
receive.alt: Arcatext translating a received message with breakdown and literal options.

homographs.title: Disambiguate homographs
homographs.description: When a word has more than one meaning, Arcatext spots it and lets you pick the correct variant, so your message is clear everytime.
bullets: Avoid awkward mistranslations before you send
homographs.alt: Arcatext identifying a homograph and offering the intended meaning.

reverse.title: Double-check the translation in your own language
reverse.description: See your message translated back into your native language before you hit send, so you always know exactly what the other person will read.
reverse.alt: Arcatext validating a translation by showing it back in the user's native language.

recipient.title: Translations that fit who you're talking to
recipient.description: Get accurate translations by choosing the correct gender of who you're talking to. Choose the writing system you feel comfortable reading, whether that's a native script or romanization.
bullets: Pick the alphabet or script you want
recipient.alt: Arcatext reword options for recipient gender, group chat, and Japanese alphabet.

synonyms.title: Grow your vocabulary as you chat
synonyms.description: Every translation comes with synonym options, so you're exposed to new ways of saying the same thing and pick up the language naturally, one message at a time.
bullets: Multiple ways to phrase every message
synonyms.alt: Arcatext offering synonym options for a translated message.

copy.title: Keep the whole thread in context
copy.description: Include a copy of each message in your own language, so you never get lost in the conversations or have to re-translate messages.
bullets: Never lose track of the thread
copy.alt: Arcatext sending a copy of the message in the user's native language.

legalPages.convenienceNotice: This translation is provided for your convenience. The English version of this document is the legally binding version; in case of any discrepancy, the English version prevails.

about.title: Breaking down language barriers
about.p1: Adalithic is a tech startup focused on giving people new tools and techniques for learning languages and facilitating cross-language communication.
about.p2: We believe that language barriers should never limit human connection and collaboration. Our mission is to create tools that make cross-cultural communication effortless and engaging, empowering people to connect globally while learning naturally.
about.v1Desc: Talk with anyone, anywhere, in the apps you already use—without switching tools or breaking your flow.
about.v2Desc: Every message is a chance to pick up new vocabulary and phrasing, turning everyday chats into real progress.
about.v3Desc: We design for genuine human conversation, so nuance and meaning are never lost in translation.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about Arcatext or interested in partnerships? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.infoDesc: Whether you're a curious user, a potential partner, or the press, our team reads every message and usually replies within a day.
contact.phMessage: Tell us about your interest in Arcatext...
contact.toastSuccessDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
